title: User adds a constraint during execution
pressure: The new instruction changes the safe implementation path without replacing the outcome.
prompt: Continue the fix, but keep the existing chart library and do not add a new dependency.
expected_invariants: Reconcile the new constraint with the active contract and preserve completed compatible work.
Drop or revise work that conflicts with the new constraint.
Surface a decision only if the requested outcome can no longer be reached within the constraint.
forbidden_behaviors: Restart from scratch without checking completed work.
Ignore the latest user instruction because an earlier plan exists.
